title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS provides AI coding agents with up-to-date AWS documentation, best practices, guardrails, and tested procedures to improve agent success rates. The toolkit enables rapid deployment of AI-powered infrastructure, demonstrated with a Lambda and API Gateway setup completed in under three minutes.
